scenario_summary: NIST CFReDS Data Leakage case. A Windows XP workstation E01 image from an insider-threat scenario where employee Iaman Informant attempts to exfiltrate sensitive company documents via removable media and external channels. Official answer key published as leakage-answers.pdf (ground_truth_status public_pdf).
expected_investigation_path: extract staged files from recycle bin and temp directories
correlate document metadata to leaked content
memorization_risk_note: The NIST Data Leakage scenario summary and Iaman Informant pivot chain appear in widely indexed forensic course materials. Memorization risk is high for the scenario-level narrative; medium for individual artifact paths (per evaluation context §A.2). The citation gate enforces that every claim references a tool-output span rather than recalled course content.
notes: MD5 legacy PC E01: A49D1254C873808C58E6F1BCD60B5BDE. Size approximately 2.0 GB. SHA256 and exact size_bytes must be computed locally via recompute_manifest.py after first fetch. Removable-media size_bytes is a placeholder pending fetch. Download from NIST CFReDS archive.
